title_home: Bude sabon zamani na kudin dijital ba tare da buƙatar sirrin kanka ba (private keys) ga daukacin bil'adama!
home_mianheading: Delta ta kaddamar da wani sabon zamani na rarrabaccen kudin dijital ga daukacin bil'adama, wanda baya bukatar tsaron sirrin kanka!
home_subheading: Zaka iya fara amfani da manhajar Delta a wayar salula yanzu don hako kudin dijital na delta kyauta kuma ba tare da amfani da wutar lantarki da yawa ba…
download_heading: Sauke manhajar Delta kuma fara hako ma'adinai da sarrafa kadarori…, Kasance tare da mu yanzu!
download_desc1: Baka bukatar saka ko kwabo daya na kudi! Delta kudin ka ne, kana da hakkin ka hako shi kyauta, abin da kake bukata kawai shi ne <u>referrer DID</u> amintacce.
is_no_referrer_DID_yet: Idan har yanzu baka da referrer DID
search_find_delta_referrer: zaka iya samun Delta referrer DID ta hanyar bincike a Intanet
download_desc2: Idan riga kana da referrer DID, zaka iya danna tambarin da ke kasa don sauke manhajar Delta.
3No-Verification_desc: Delta tsarin kudin dijital ne wanda ke bin tsarin tabbaci-guda-uku-babu, wanda zai iya hana mantawa da bayanan shiga ko asarar kadarori.
decentralization_desc: Amintacce, na fili, bayyananne, kuma kowa yana shiga cikin tsarawa da tabbatarwa
mobile_first_desc: Yana da saukin amfani, hako kudi da amfani da ayyuka daban-daban a wayar ka
environment_friendly_desc: Baya cin karin wutar lantarki ko yanar gizo, babu tarin sharar lantarki
safety_circle_desc: Tabbatar da tsaro ta hanyar zamantakewa, tabbacin shaida baya dogara ga kowace kungiya ta tsakiya
fair_distribution_desc: Hanyar rarrabawa ita ce ta hako kudi a tsakanin al'umma da ladan gina tsarin, ba tare da wani tallace-tallace na farko ko ICO ba
decentralized_multi-chain_wallet_desc: Sarrafa kadarori na sarka daban-daban cikin sauki ba tare da kowane sirrin kanka ba
web3_application_center_desc: Gina da wallafa manhajojin Web3 cikin sauki ta hanyar dApp Square
ICP_smart_blockchain_desc: Dangane da dandalin kwangilar ICP, amintacce, ingantaccen lissafi, fadada mara iyaka
DAO_governance_model_desc: Hadin gwiwar gudanarwa ga daukacin bil'adama, ci gaba mai ma'ana, aminci na dogon lokaci
explore_delta_heading:
Bincika asirin Delta,
Bari mu gina ingantaccen tsarin kudin dijital na nan gaba tare...
DSMS_access_terminal_heading: Wurin shiga tabbacin DSMS shine bangaren tabbatarwa na Delta wanda ke rarrabe, kuma shine farkon mafita ga tsarin tabbaci-babu
access_terminal_question1: Mene ne amfanin zama mai tabbatarwa (validator)?
access_terminal_question3: Shin ina bukatar sauke shirin wurin shigar?
access_terminal_question4: Mene ne mai tabbatarwa yake bukatar shiryawa?
access_terminal_answer1: Yayin da masu tabbatarwa ke raba albarkatun tabbatarwa don tsaron hanyar sadarwa ta Delta, suma zasu iya samun ladan tabbatarwa. Don cikakkun bayanai, duba takardar bayani.
access_terminal_answer2: Kowa yana da dama daidai ya zama mai tabbatarwa. Idan kana son zama mamba, zaka iya shiga shafin "Menu" a manhajar Delta ka nemo "DSMS Verification Qualification".
access_terminal_answer3: Masu amfani da Delta wadanda ba su sami cancantar zama masu tabbatarwa ba, ba sa bukatar sauke wannan shiri.
access_terminal_answer4: Idan ka samu cancanta, kana bukatar wayar salula da kake ajiye da kuma MSISDN sadaukarwa, tare da yanayin sigina mai kyau.
about_3-No-Verification_to_whitepaper_ch: Don karin bayani game da Tabbaci-Guda-Uku-Babu, duba bangarorin takardar bayani.
